title: Orb - Mini Arcade Machine, 300 in-Built Games, 8-Bit Retro Arcade Games, 2.5” Full Colour Screen, 8-Way Joystick, 2 Buttons, Volume Control
features: 🕹 Relive the classic 80's games in this mini handheld retro arcade games machine that can be played handheld or on a table.
🎯 Pre-loaded with 300 x built-in fun & challenging 8-bit video games for hours of entertainment.
🔎 Games Categorised into: Action, Platform, Puzzle, Shooting, Racing & Strategy.
📺 Full Colour 2.5" LCD screen for an enhanced gaming experience.
🎵 Sound effects & music delivered through the built-in speakers with volume control.
description: From the brand Previous page 20+ MAKING GIFTS Since 2004, we've been designing & making the world's most giftable own branded & officially licensed products such as Original Stormtrooper, Atari, Pusheen, Power Squad, Thumbs Up!, Orb, Swipe & more. BEST GIFTS Visit the store How we got started? In 2004, we started designing and making cool gifts for major retailers in the UK and today, we supply major retailers across the globe. What makes our products unique? We have a talented design team in our UK Headquarters that spend days, weeks and months mocking up some of the world’s most purchased gifts such as the Award-Winning Camera Lens Mug, Original Stormtrooper Products, and even Borat's Mankini. Why we love what we do? Everyone loves a good surprise and that's exactly what our products deliver. We're a creative bunch and love putting smiles on people's faces. Next page
